name: Halloween Night
description:
A Halloween That Never Ends

You find yourself in Fallbrook, a small, unassuming suburban town nestled in the heart of the Midwest. At first glance, it seems like a perfect slice of Americana—tree-lined streets, cozy homes, and cheerful jack-o’-lanterns glowing on every porch. It’s Halloween night, and the town is alive with festive energy: children scurry door-to-door in costumes, neighbors laugh over bowls of candy, and flickering streetlights cast an orange glow over scattered leaves.

But something is wrong.

This isn’t an ordinary Halloween. The night never ends.

The clock hands are stuck, the sun refuses to rise, and the once-charming holiday atmosphere has taken on a sinister edge. As the hours drag on, the festive decorations seem to mock reality, their smiling faces twisting into something grotesque. The streets grow quieter. Shadows deepen. Whispers echo in the distance.

You are not just a part of this world—you are its nightmare. Whether you are a creature of terror summoned by the curse, a deranged killer driven by madness, or even an ordinary soul twisted by the endless night, you now haunt this place. Your actions will shape how the town reacts to you—will you rule over Fallbrook as a being of pure fear, or will you succumb to the powers that bind it in this eternal Halloween?

---

The Suburbia of Shadows

Fallbrook is an authentic, living world. Its neighborhoods stretch endlessly under the orange moonlight, each filled with detailed, lifelike homes and the people who live within them. Every house tells a story:

The bright, welcoming homes where families huddle together, desperate to believe the night is just a harmless celebration.

The darkened, empty houses, their owners either missing or locked away in fear.

The abandoned ruins where you can feel the weight of past horrors, their eerie silence louder than any scream.

The streets are alive—at first. Trick-or-treaters roam in groups, dragging heavy bags of candy, while adults patrol the sidewalks to keep them safe. Some homes are warm and inviting, offering bowls of candy by the door, while others are locked tight, their inhabitants peeking nervously through curtains. Alleyways and parks offer places to stalk or hide, but they’re also rife with danger. The deeper you venture, the more the world warps into a twisted reflection of reality.

---

The Fallbrook Police and Community

The Fallbrook Community Safety Department (FCSD) is on edge, overwhelmed by reports of strange disturbances: frightened children, broken windows, and mysterious shadows darting through backyards. At first, they treat it as a chaotic but manageable Halloween, but as your terror spreads, they begin to understand that something far darker is at play.

Patrols roam the streets, their flashlights cutting through the fog, responding to 911 calls and investigating screams.

K9 units and drones join the search as the night escalates.

The SWAT team mobilizes if your actions cause enough chaos to disrupt the fragile order of Fallbrook.

But the police are only human. The endless night is wearing them down. With each passing hour, their numbers thin, and their determination falters. If you’re clever, you can exploit their desperation, drawing them into traps or overwhelming their resources.

---

The Truth Beneath the Mask

Why does this night never end? Fallbrook holds its secrets close, but if you dig deep enough, you’ll uncover the dark truth. Strange symbols etched into doorframes, old diaries tucked away in attics, and whispers of a long-forgotten curse hint at the town’s sinister history.

Perhaps the Halloween decorations are not decorations at all. Perhaps the town’s traditions are more than just playful rituals. Perhaps something ancient and malevolent is watching you from
creator: Qeratokalori
